characters.name: Fishtronaut (character)
characters.description: For the television series he appears, seeFishtronaut (TV series). FishtronautAliasesAgent FishtronautPhysical descriptionSpeciesGoldfishGenderMaleEye colorBlackAppearancesDebut"The Case of the Disappearing Picnic Baskets"Fishtronaut(original name:Peixonauta) is an anthropomorphic goldfish that is the main protagonist of the seriesof the same name. He is a super secret agent who solves the cases with the given clues by the P.O.P. and sent by the S.E.A., along with his friendsMarinaandZeek. Fishtronaut is a super secret agent who is very serious in solving cases. With his friends Marina and Zeek, they work together to help solve the mystery after opening the P.O.P. and ask other animals and or Dr. Green or Happy Plumb to help solve the case. Whenever the case is solved, Fishtronaut and his friends encounter another P.O.P.. After opening the second P.O.P., he and his friends receive the reward for their completion.
